Coefficients from a single BRIER fit

coef.BRIER.eta.Rd

Extract coefficients from a fitted BRIER.eta object at one or more lambda values. Lambda values not in the fitted path are obtained by linear interpolation between adjacent fitted lambdas.

Usage

# S3 method for class 'BRIER.eta'
coef(object, lambda, which = seq_along(object$lambda), drop = TRUE, ...)

Arguments

object

An object of class "BRIER.eta".

lambda

Optional numeric vector of lambda values at which to extract coefficients. Must lie within the fitted path. If missing, coefficients are returned at the indices given by which.

which

Integer vector specifying which lambda indices to return. Defaults to all fitted lambdas.

drop

Logical. If TRUE, drop singleton dimensions from the output.

...

Unused; present for S3 method compatibility.

Value

A numeric matrix or vector of coefficients.

See also

predict.BRIER.eta, coef.BRIER
